caption: A man with short grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit jacket and a light-colored shirt, is captured in a series of frames during a formal proceeding. He is seated in a wooden chair and gestures with his right arm. In the initial frames, he has his hand raised and is looking toward someone off-screen to the right. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arm and extends his hand forward in a sweeping gesture, his mouth opening as if speaking. To his left, another person is partially visible, showing only an arm and a hand resting on a desk. In the background, a red bag with a cartoon character is visible. A white and green graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the screen, featuring the logo "ORCA" and the text "April 12, 2019", "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs", and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage".
